---
title: "`r params$doc_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$doc_subtitle`"
author: "Biometrics Group, IRRI"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"  
# date last modified: 2022 June 28
params:
  id: "cletywqy02084"
  phenoDTfile: "cletywqy02084.rds"
  trait: !r c("GYKGPHA","Height") # per trait
  outputPath: !r here::here("Result")
  doc_title: "Visualization of raw data"
  doc_subtitle: "Version 2.1"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: FALSE
      smooth_scroll: FALSE
---

<style>
.main-container {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: auto;
}
.tab-content {
margin-bottom: 50px;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include = FALSE}

# knitr R markdown chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dependson = knitr::all_labels(),
                      echo = FALSE,
                      cache = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      comment = NA,
                      out.width = "100%",
                      error = TRUE)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '', knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")

# loading necessary R packages ####
## data manipulation
library(dplyr)      # %>%, data cleaning functions
library(tidyr)      # pivot_()
library(magrittr)   # %<>%, coerce col to factors or numeric
library(stringr)    # str_detect()
library(data.table) # %Like%
library(scales)     # rescale data between to values
library(cgiarBase)

## outputs - graphs, tables
library(ggplot2)    # ggplot(), etc.
library(DT)         # datatable()
library(knitr)      # kable()
library(kableExtra) # kable_styling(), etc.
library(viridis)    # scale_fill_viridis()
# library(gge)        # gge(), biplot()
library(plotly)     # ggplotly()
library(htmltools)  # tagList()

## parallel computing
# library(foreach)    # foreach(), %dopar%, etc.
# library(doParallel) # registerDoParallel()

```


```{r dataLoading, include = FALSE}
# loading the dataset
if (is.null(params$phenoDTfile)) stop("No input phenotypic data file specified.")
mydata <- readRDS(file.path("files_cleaned",params$phenoDTfile))
params01 <- read.csv("parameters.csv")
params02 <- read.csv("modeling.csv")
params11 <- params01[which(params01$analysis.id == params$id),]
params12 <- params02[which(params02$analysis.id == params$id),]
params2 <- as.list(params11)
params2$trait <- params12$trait

```

***  

## Trials Overview

<div style = "width:75%; height:auto;">
```{r summary2, include = TRUE}

summaryInfo2 <- tribble(
  ~cat, ~val,
  "**Experimental designs**", paste0(unique(mydata[, "designF"]), collapse = ", "),
  "**Traits**", paste0(params2$trait, collapse = ", "),
  "**Countries**", paste0(unique(mydata[, "countryF"]), collapse = ", "),
  "**Environments**", paste0(unique(mydata[, "fieldinstF"]), collapse = ", "),
  "**Number of trials**", as.character(length(unique(mydata[, "trialF"]))),
  "**Number of entries**", as.character(length(unique(mydata[, "genoF"]))),
  "**Number of checks**", as.character(length(unique(mydata[mydata$entryType2 == "check", "genoF"])))
  
)
names(summaryInfo2) <- c("", "")
kable(summaryInfo2) %>% kable_styling(full_width = F)

```
</div>

### Numerical Descriptive Measures

```{r dataChecking, include=TRUE}
descStatTemp <- list()
groupingVars <- c(union(params2$combineWithin, c("year", "season", "location")), "trial")
for (i in 1:length(params2$trait)) {
  descStatTemp[[i]] <- mydata %>% 
    group_by(across(all_of(groupingVars))) %>% 
    summarise(trait = params2$trait[i],
              n = sum(!is.na(get(params2$trait[i]))), 
              min = min(get(params2$trait[i]), na.rm = T),
              mean = mean(get(params2$trait[i]), na.rm = T),
              max = max(get(params2$trait[i]), na.rm = T),
              stddev = sd(get(params2$trait[i]), na.rm = T))
}

descStat.All <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, descStatTemp)

printTable(descStat.All, 
           numericColNames = c("min", "mean", "max", "stddev"),
           caption = "using the cleaned dataset")

```


### Trait distribution by trial {.tabset .tabset-pills}  

Using the cleaned dataset  

```{r visual, results = 'asis'}

fig <- plot_ly(mydata, x = ~fieldinstF)

ll <- list()
for(j in 1:length(params2$trait)){
  vv=ifelse(j==1,TRUE,FALSE)
  yy=mydata[,params2$trait[j]]
  if(vv){
    fig <- fig %>% add_boxplot(y = mydata[,params2$trait[j]], name = params2$trait[j])
    ll[[j]] <- list(method = "restyle",
                    args = list("visible", list(TRUE, FALSE)),
                    label = params2$trait[j])
  }else{
    fig <- fig %>% add_boxplot(y = mydata[,params2$trait[j]], name = params2$trait[j], visible=vv)
    ll[[j]] <- list(method = "restyle",
                    args = list("visible", list(FALSE, TRUE)),
                    label = params2$trait[j])
  }
}
fig <- fig %>% layout(
  title = "Raw data distribution across trials",
  xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Trials"),
  yaxis = list(title = "Response variable units"),
  updatemenus = list(
    list(
      # y = 0.8,
      buttons = ll
    )
  ))

fig

```

### Spatial effect by trial and trait {.tabset .tabset-pills} 

```{r visual2, results = 'asis'}

mydata <- mydata[which(!is.na(mydata$rowcoord) & !is.na(mydata$colcoord)),]
flevels <- unique(mydata$fieldinstF)
figList <- list(); counter=1
# print(flevels)
for(iField in flevels){
  
  mydataSub <- droplevels(mydata[which(mydata$fieldinstF == iField),])
  
  fig <- plot_ly(mydataSub, x = ~rowcoord, y=~colcoord, colors = colorRamp(c("red", "green"))) # colors = "Greys") # 
  
  ll <- list()
  for(j in 1:length(params2$trait)){
    vv=ifelse(j==1,TRUE,FALSE)
    yy=mydataSub[,params2$trait[j]]
    if(vv){
      fig <- fig %>% add_heatmap(z = mydataSub[,params2$trait[j]], name = params2$trait[j])
      ll[[j]] <- list(method = "restyle",
                      args = list("visible", list(TRUE, FALSE)),
                      label = params2$trait[j])
    }else{
      fig <- fig %>% add_heatmap(z = mydataSub[,params2$trait[j]], name = params2$trait[j], visible=vv)
      ll[[j]] <- list(method = "restyle",
                      args = list("visible", list(FALSE, TRUE)),
                      label = params2$trait[j])
    }
  }
  fig <- fig %>% layout(
    title = paste("Spatial distribution in trial", iField),
    xaxis = list(domain = c(0.1, 1), title="Row coordinate"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Column coordinate"),
    updatemenus = list(
      list(
        # y = 0.8,
        buttons = ll
      )
    ))
  
  figList[[counter]] <- fig; counter=counter+1
  
}
# 
subplot(figList, nrows=length(flevels))
```
